_comment: Per-ROLE model SKUs for mChatAI+ binary services that need a SPECIFIC model (NOT the user's top-of-screen selection). RULE #1: edit here + refreshMchataisourceCache to ship a new model with zero rebuild. role -> CloudProvider rawValue -> direct-API SKU. Mirrored by RoleModelService.swift's frozen fallback.

visualEvaluatorVision._comment: VisualEvaluatorService — cheap vision model, runs on every install render-gate probe.

videoAnalysisVision._comment: VideoAnalysisService — capable vision model for frame/scene analysis.
